FeedbackTemplate.instructions:
Sample questions to ask: 
- Describe a time you faced a challenge. How did you overcome it?
- Tell me about a situation you "went against the norm." What was the result?
- What is something you want to work on personally? Professionally?

scores.description: Will this person work well in a fast paced environment?
How did they perform in their previous roles?
Are they going to help lead the team to set a high bar?
Will they help structure and build our team in a thoughtful manner?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions:
This is an initial call for the Hiring Manager to discover more about the candidate, understand what they are looking for in their next role and if there is a mutual fit.

Sample questions to ask: 
- Describe a time you faced a challenge. How did you overcome it?
- Tell me about a situation you "went against the norm." What was the result?
- What is something you want to work on personally? Professionally?

scores.description: Will this person work well in a fast paced environment?
How did they perform in their previous roles?
Are they going to help lead the team to set a high bar?
Will they help structure and build our team in a thoughtful manner?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions: The goal of this interview is to gauge a candidate's ability to lead and empower their team.  We aren't looking for a 'manager' we are looking for a 'leader.'  Please use the questions below to identify leadership style and how they mentor teams.

scores.description: Has a point of view on clear communication; self-awareness of their own communication style.

Decision making
Provides examples of difficult decisions, can balance decision stakeholders.
Can inspire and motivate people under them.
Can demonstrate solid understanding of delegating responsibilities.
Can explain their ideal candidate and hiring process.

options.text: Has managed a division, with people managers under them
Has managed a large team, with 10+ under them
Has managed a team, with fewer than 10 under them
Has never managed before, but has demonstrated mentorship

fields.text: Tell me about a time when you disagreed with a manager?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions:
Take this time to make the candidate feel welcome at our office.  Help them settle in and relax, interviews can be nerve racking and we want them to enjoy their time here.  

Sample questions: 
- How do you like the lunch today?
- How was your weekend?

fields.text: Which languages are you comfortable with?
Which languages are you comfortable with?
Which languages are you comfortable with?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions:
The purpose of this interview is to gauge the candidate's presentation skills by conducting a mock meeting. 

Sample questions: 
- How do you think your presentation went?
- What do you think you could have done better?

scores.description: Was this person easily able to connect with you?
Did they try to understand your point of view and find a common ground?
Did they run an effective meeting?
Was their solution compelling?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions:
This is an initial call to discover more about the candidate, understand what they are looking for in their next role and if there is a mutual fit.

Sample questions to ask: 
- How did you get into your line of work?
- What are the top 3 things you are looking for in a company? In your next role?
- When do you want to make a switch?

fields.text: How well does their background align with the role?
What are they looking for in their next role?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions:
Use this form to capture feedback from reference checks. 

Sample questions: 
- What was this person's strength?
- What was this person's weakness?
- Would you hire this person again?

fields.text: Would you hire/work with this person again?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions: The purpose of this interview is to identify proficiencies in problem solving and programming.

scores.description: Is the candidate familiar with the necessary programming languages for this role?
How does the candidate describe troubleshooting bugs?
How well can the candidate present and explain technical details to a non-technical audience?
How does the candidate ensure that his or her programs run smoothly and quickly?
How familiar is the candidate with design patterns?

fields.description: Fix the bug in this code.

fields.text: Do they have an innovative approach to problem solving?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions:
This is an initial call to discover more if the candidate has the necessary technical skills for the job.

Sample questions to ask: 
- How did you get into your line of work?
- Tell me about a time where you worked with [relevant programming language]

fields.text: How well does their background align with the role?

FeedbackTemplate.instructions: Will this candidate align with our values and internal culture?

scores.description: Will this candidate work will with a team?
Is this candidate a hardworker?
Will this candidate bring a positive attitude?

fields.text: What do you hope to achieve moving forward?
What are you looking for in your new workplace?

headers.content-security-policy-report-only: default-src 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev;child-src 'self';connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.sentry.io https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev wss://api.nango.dev/ https://connect.nango.dev https://*.posthog.com https://*.stripe.com https://*.plain.com wss://*.plain.com;font-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com;frame-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev https://www.youtube.com https://*.stripe.com;img-src 'self' data: https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com https://img.logo.dev https://*.ytimg.com https://*.plain.com;manifest-src 'self';media-src 'self';object-src 'self';script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.stripe.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://*.posthog.com https://www.youtube.com https://chat.cdn-plain.com;style-src blob: 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev;worker-src blob: 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com;base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';script-src-attr 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.access-control-expose-headers: Authorization, Etag, Content-Type, Content-Length, X-Nango-Signature, X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
